finding_results.notes: Nine thesis-speech or aphoristic-landing moments roughened across both payoff zones. Zone 1 (Martin's protection diagnosis): Paul's catalog broken with a mid-phrase stop at 'like you were—' (379); Tommy's system analysis broken into two interrupted attempts with 'He was—' and 'he got to—' (409); 'organized guilt. It had a schedule.' replaced with less quotable 'it never stopped. It just kept showing up' (427); Tommy's clean insight 'The problem is you thought you were the one he trusted with the hard stuff' broken into 'You thought you were the one he—' restart (433); narrator admiration paragraphs removed ('There it was. Not eloquent.'; 'Paul almost smiled at the phrase'). Zone 2 (house reveal aftermath): 'He left me the whole machine' broken into 'Every—' breath catch (497); stacking catalog in 'Every year' speech trimmed to remove repeated room/drawer/chair material (499); 'Without that' speech trimmed from composed enumeration to blunt stop (525); 'Habit gets big enough, it starts looking like love' replaced with trailing specifics and 'I don't know what to call that' (539); 'Only Martin could turn real estate into penance' replaced with exhausted 'Only Martin' and narrator admiration removed (559). One clean line preserved — 'It was love too. I'm not saying it wasn't.' (543) — now isolated between roughened material and earned by surrounding friction. All must-land beats, payoffs, and state deltas preserved.

summary: Roughened the payoff dialogue in both emotional-peak zones to fix thesis-speech, aphoristic landings, and mini-speech diagnosis. Seven polished lines replaced with interrupted, restarted, or incomplete speech (exceeding the two-minimum). Paul now fails to phrase Martin cleanly on the first try (line 379 stutter). Tommy's realizations arrive through concrete recall and abandoned sentences rather than clean analysis. Three narrator-admiration paragraphs removed. Same information and state shift preserved throughout; all tracked payoffs (martin_tommy_bond, martin_will) and must-land beats intact.
